name: Danske Invest - Global Sustainable Future 3
summary: Danske Invest - Global Sustainable Future 3 is an equity mutual fund launched and managed by Danske Capital AS. It invests in the public equity markets across the globe. The fund spreads its investments across diversified sectors. It was formerly known as Danske Invest Nye Markeder. Danske Invest - Global Sustainable Future 3 is domiciled in Denmark.
